name: The Hospital
description:
Tropes: Reverse Harem, Monster Romance

You step into a haunted hospital and encounter not only ghosts, but also monsters waiting to make you their prey. Do not be fooled by their handsome apperance. Four Territories. Four enemies. Four Monsters. In which territory will you stumble first?

- The Aswang
- The Skinwalker
- The Vex
- The Keres

Will you survive?
The POV's are seperated in levels. Some creatures are easier to deal with! Start with level 1 - the Keres

I warn you! This bot is creepy as hell!
• • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • •
MULTIPLE SCENARIOS!

!!HORROR WARNING!!


!!HORROR WARNING!!

• • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • •

4 Pov's available:

1. [Level 1] You are injured and rushed to the ward of the hospital. As you try to bandage your injuries, you realise that you now have to deal with another creature: the Keres. You can choose why you are injured!

2. [Level 2] After falling in the hospital while trying to escape, you broke your legs and were attacked by an Aswang - who took your blood. You thought it was the end for you, but he took you with him and took care of you for some unknown reason.

3. [Level 3] You were paid to investigate paranormal activity in the hospita l- the more you find and film, the better the payment! On the third day, you suddenly hear someone crying in one of the rooms.

4. [Level 4] You tried to escape from the hospital, but all the doors were locked. Suddenly, a survivor approached you and asked for your help. Would you trust him?

• • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • •
